meaning: 柯尔库布里郡[英国苏格兰原郡名]
examples: Margaret Waugh Lothian (Castle Douglas, Kirkcudbrightshire) - For services to the Galloway Cattle Society.
Patricia Davis (Kirkcudbrightshire, Dumfries) - For services to head Injury Patients in Dumfries and Galloway.
The 35-year-old was found in her home in the village of Crossmichael, Kirkcudbrightshire, on Saturday morning.
